catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-1.explanation: The speaker is inviting someone to an event.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-2.explanation: He thinks the centre should cater better for young children.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-3.explanation: She resents the idea that her life is glamorous.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-4.explanation: He explains how readers of different ages respond to his poetry.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-5.explanation: She felt it did not give enough useful information.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-6.explanation: She is glad she went, even though the result was disappointing.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-7.explanation: They agree the dishes are beautifully presented.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-8.explanation: He is announcing changes to a transport service.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-9.explanation: She was fascinated by the bear's name.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-10.explanation: Markings also appear on the chest.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-11.explanation: Bears have been sighted in northern regions.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-13.explanation: Their winter behaviour is unusual compared with other bears.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-14.explanation: Human activity poses the greatest threat.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-17.explanation: Small mice are their preferred meat.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-18.explanation: He wrote a humorous diary of his research.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-20.explanation: Speaker 2 was impressed by the scenery.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-23.explanation: Speaker 5 valued how friendly people were.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-24.explanation: She feels the title fits most of her duties.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-25.explanation: Work is usually rejected on quality grounds.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-26.explanation: Rejecting artists' work leads to awkward calls.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-27.explanation: The commentary provides context about the artist.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-28.explanation: Colleagues handle much of the admin.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-29.explanation: She makes the first approach to companies.

catalog-listening-fce-b2-test1-q-30.explanation: She loves that no two days are the same.
